title: PRA Glossary - Z
content_markdown:
# PRA Glossary - Z

## zillmerising

means a method for modifying the netpremiumreserve method of valuing acontract of long-term insuranceby increasing the part of the futurepremiumsfor which credit is taken so as to allow for initial expenses.
content_html:
PRA Glossary - Z

zillmerising
means a method for modifying the netpremiumreserve method of valuing acontract of long-term insuranceby increasing the part of the futurepremiumsfor which credit is taken so as to allow for initial expenses.
